subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the speech of Abdu'l-Baha! Verily, I speak unto thee through the tongue of my spirit, from the spiritual direction
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @high station of the true believer, @humility; meekness; lowliness
